globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://*.blob.core.windows.net https://*.blob.core.windows.net/*; connect-src 'self' https://*.blob.core.windows.net https://*.blob.core.windows.net/*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none';
